subcommands.name: serve
subcommands.description: Serve the application on the PHP development server

options.name: --host
options.description: The host address to serve the application on

options.name: --port
options.description: The port to serve the application on

options.name: --tries
options.description: The max number of ports to attempt to serve from

options.name: --no-reload
options.description: Do not reload the development server on .env file changes

options.name: --database
options.description: The database connection to use

options.name: --force
options.description: Force the operation to run when in production

options.name: --path
options.description: The path(s) to the migrations files to be executed

options.name: --realpath
options.description: Indicate any provided migration file paths are pre-resolved absolute paths

options.name: --schema-path
options.description: The path to a schema dump file

options.name: --pretend
options.description: Dump the SQL queries that would be run

options.name: --seed
options.description: Indicates if the seed task should be re-run

options.name: --seeder
options.description: The class name of the root seeder

options.name: --step
options.description: Force the migrations to be run so they can be rolled back individually

subcommands.name: make:model
subcommands.description: Create a new Eloquent model class

options.name: --all
options.description: Generate a migration, seeder, factory, policy, resource controller, and form request classes for the model

options.name: --controller
options.description: Create a new controller for the model

options.name: --factory
options.description: Create a new factory for the model

options.name: --force
options.description: Create the class even if the model already exists

options.name: --migration
options.description: Create a new migration file for the model

options.name: --morph-pivot
options.description: Indicates if the generated model should be a custom polymorphic intermediate table model

options.name: --policy
options.description: Create a new policy for the model

options.name: --seed
options.description: Create a new seeder for the model

options.name: --pivot
options.description: Indicates if the generated model should be a custom intermediate table model

options.name: --resource
options.description: Indicates if the generated controller should be a resource controller

options.name: --api
options.description: Indicates if the generated controller should be an API resource controller

options.name: --requests
options.description: Create new form request classes and use them in the resource controller

options.name: --compact
options.description: Only show method, URI and action columns

options.name: --json
options.description: Output the route list as JSON

options.name: --method
options.description: Filter the routes by method

options.name: --path
options.description: Filter the routes by path

options.name: --execute
options.description: Execute the given code using Tinker

globalOptions.name: --env
globalOptions.description: The environment the command should run under

globalOptions.name: --help
globalOptions.description: Display help for the given command
